directors.name: Cheryl K. Beebe
directors.bio_summary: Ms. Beebe served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Ingredion Incorporated from 2004 until her retirement in January 2014, having also held roles as Vice President of Finance and Treasurer. She brings financial expertise, international business experience, and agricultural business knowledge to the Board.
other_public_boards: Goldman Sachs Asset Management (CEF-IF-ETF-Goldman Sachs Trust II)

directors.name: Gregory L. Ebel
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Ebel has served as Chairman of Enbridge, Inc. since its merger with Spectra Energy Corp in early 2017, having previously served as Chairman, President and CEO of Spectra Energy from 2014 to 2017. He also held roles at Duke Energy Corporation, including Vice President of Investor and Shareholder Relations.

directors.name: Timothy S. Gitzel
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Gitzel has been President and Chief Executive Officer of Cameco Corporation, a uranium producer, since July 2011, having previously served as President and as Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Cameco. He brings over 25 years of senior management experience in Canadian and international uranium and mining activities.

directors.name: Denise C. Johnson
directors.bio_summary: Ms. Johnson is Group President of Resource Industries at Caterpillar, Incorporated, a position she has held since February 2016. Prior to Caterpillar, she held increasingly important roles at General Motors Corporation and General Motors Company from 1989 through 2011.

directors.name: Emery N. Koenig
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Koenig is the retired Vice Chairman and Chief Risk Officer of Cargill, Incorporated, having held that position since September 2013 until his retirement in February 2016. He also served as a member of Cargill's Corporate Leadership Team and board of directors and led various Cargill platforms including Agricultural Supply Chain.

directors.name: James (Joc) C. O'Rourke
directors.bio_summary: Mr. O'Rourke was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of The Mosaic Company in August 2015, having previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. Prior to joining Mosaic, he was President, Australia Pacific for Barrick Gold Corporation from 2006 to 2008.

directors.name: David T. Seaton
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Seaton is the former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Fluor Corporation, having served as Chairman from February 2012 and CEO from February 2011 until May 2019. He joined Fluor in 1984 and held numerous positions in operations and sales globally before becoming CEO.

directors.name: Steven M. Seibert
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Seibert is a land use and environmental attorney and Florida Supreme Court-certified mediator who has operated The Seibert Law Firm in St. Petersburg, Florida since January 2003. He co-founded strategy consulting firm triSect, LLC in 2013 and served as interim Executive Director of the Florida Humanities Council from December 2016 to October 2020.

directors.name: Luciano Siani Pires
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Siani Pires was elected Executive Vice President of Strategy and Business Development for Vale, S.A. in November 2021, having previously served as Chief Financial Officer of Vale since July 2012. Prior to Vale, he held leadership positions at Brazil's National Development Bank.

directors.name: Gretchen H. Watkins
directors.bio_summary: Ms. Watkins joined Shell USA, Inc. in May 2018 as President Shell USA and Executive Vice President Global Shales. She previously served as Chief Executive Officer of Maersk Oil and Gas from 2016 to 2018 and held various corporate officer positions at Marathon Oil Company and BP plc.

directors.name: Kelvin R. Westbrook
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Westbrook has been President and Chief Executive Officer of KRW Advisors, LLC, a strategic and business consulting firm, since September 2007. He previously founded Millennium Digital Media Systems, LLC in 1997 and served in various leadership roles there until 2007.

extraction_notes: The proxy text provided focused primarily on the director nominees section. No executive officer table was included in the extracted text, so executive_officers is left empty. Kelvin R. Westbrook is listed as Corporate Governance and Nominating Committee Chair in the committee section; however, the EHSS Committee Chair is Emery N. Koenig. Cheryl K. Beebe is listed as Audit Committee Chair. Timothy S. Gitzel is listed as Compensation Committee Chair. Gregory L. Ebel serves as Independent Chairman of the Board. Note that Oscar P. Bernardes is mentioned as an incumbent director retiring at the 2022 Annual Meeting and is not included among the 11 nominees. Tenure years are calculated based on 'Director Since' year subtracted from 2022. For David T. Seaton, tenure is counted from his return to the Board in September 2019. Enbridge, Inc. is listed as both Mr. Ebel's employer and a current public board seat, which is correct as he serves as Chairman there.
